item.title: Searching for Wild King Cobras
item.description: Chandler’s Wild Life searches for wild king cobras while observing wildlife in a natural setting.

media:content.media:title: Searching for Wild King Cobras
media:content.media:description: Chandler’s Wild Life searches for wild king cobras while observing wildlife in a natural setting.

item.title: Observing a Venomous Snake in the Wild
item.description: Chandler’s Wild Life shares a respectful wildlife encounter while observing one of the world’s most venomous snakes.

media:content.media:title: Observing a Venomous Snake in the Wild
media:content.media:description: Chandler’s Wild Life shares a respectful wildlife encounter while observing one of the world’s most venomous snakes.

item.title: Baby Python Encounter
item.description: A close wildlife encounter with a baby python, highlighting careful handling and observation.

media:content.media:title: Baby Python Encounter
media:content.media:description: A close wildlife encounter with a baby python, highlighting careful handling and observation.

item.title: Close Call with a King Cobra
item.description: A wildlife encounter featuring a king cobra, highlighting careful observation and respect for nature.

media:content.media:title: Close Call with a King Cobra
media:content.media:description: A wildlife encounter featuring a king cobra, highlighting careful observation and respect for nature.

item.title: Coby the 10-Foot Black Mamba
item.description: A close look at Coby, a 10-foot black mamba, shared by Chandler's Wild Life.

media:content.media:title: Coby the 10-Foot Black Mamba
media:content.media:description: A close look at Coby, a 10-foot black mamba, shared by Chandler's Wild Life.
